title: Sit Command│坐下指令
description: Use /trigger to sit down.│使用/trigger來坐下。
body:
# Preface│前言
In fact, there are many mods or datapacks that have made the function of allowing players to sit down, but some have too many bugs, and some are too easy to trigger the sit down function.│其實有很多模組或是資料包都做了讓玩家坐下的功能，但有的bug太多，有的太容易觸發坐下功能。

This datapack uses It can be used without op
```/trigger```
 to trigger the sit down effect, and it has almost no flaws (hopefully).│此資料包使用無需op即可使用的
``/trigger``
觸發坐下效果，而且它幾乎沒有缺點（希望如此）。
# How to use?│如何使用？
After loading the datapack, you can enter the command 
```/trigger sit``` to sit down. To get up, just press the crouch button.│載入數據包後，輸入指令
```/trigger sit```
即可坐下來。要起身，只需按潛行鍵即可。
